species: Application of carbohydrate arrays coupled with mass spectrometry to detect activity of plant-polysaccharide degradative enzymes from the fungus Aspergillus niger
sample_source: culture filtrate of A. niger grown on wheat straw
we demonstrate how this platform is suitable for detection of enzyme activity in relevant biological samples, the culture filtrate of A. niger grown on wheat straw.
strain: The fungus Aspergillus niger strain AB4.1 was grown on potato dextrose agar slopes at 28 °C until spores were produced.
